'''Arcura''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] world in the [[Arcura system/Legends|Arcura system]]. [[Reina Gale]] once sought to pull a con job on the planet, but was hindered by [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]].

{{Planet-stub}}
